title: There's Something Here!!
summary: A brief discussion about UAP/UFO evidence, touching on credible eyewitness testimony from fighter pilots and photographic evidence of objects displaying unusual capabilities. The speakers express that serious examination of the evidence suggests something genuinely anomalous exists.

key_claims.claim: There is photographic evidence of objects that can gyrate in ways consistent with Pentagon statements about UAP
Fighter pilots who are considered totally dependable have witnessed unexplained phenomena
There is potentially something millions of years more advanced than humans that can do things humans can barely fathom
